description: §38.13.3 — an `<onchange>` inside an ordinary (non-`watches=`) channel fires E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED. `<onchange>` is a scrml-defined structural element valid ONLY inside a `watches=` channel body (§4.15 / §24.4); outside that locus there is no RowChange to dispatch.
rationale: §38.13.3: `<onchange>` is valid ONLY inside a `watches=` channel body; an `<onchange>` elsewhere reuses E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED (§4.15 / §24.4).
